title: craterostigma engleri
intro: Craterostigma engleri, also known as Coleus engleriana, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as malaria, fever, and diarrhea, due to its anthraquinone and flavonoid content. The plant is believed to have health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Traditionally, Craterostigma engleri is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to be used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits.
